questions.question: Describe the main advantages of the Chalk and Talk method over traditional teaching methods in terms of learner engagement. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Clearly explain the benefits of Chalk and Talk method

questions.question: Compare and contrast the Chalk and Talk method with a PowerPoint Presentation in terms of effectiveness for conveying complex information to learners. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Provide a detailed explanation of the differences between the two methods

questions.question: What are some potential drawbacks of using PowerPoint Presentations in the classroom, and how can they be mitigated to improve learner engagement? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Discuss the limitations of PowerPoint Presentations and suggest ways to overcome them
